description_long: This is a stylized red double-decker bus reminiscent of the classic London Routemaster, featuring two levels of large rectangular windows along each side. The bus has a rounded front with two prominent headlights and a distinctive grille, while the rear is flat with a single window on the upper deck. The wheels are simple and black, with the lower deck windows slightly larger than those on the upper deck. A white horizontal stripe runs around the bus, separating the two levels visually. The entry door is located at the rear on the lower deck, and the bus has a robust, boxy structure typical of public transit vehicles.
description: A red double-decker bus with large rectangular windows, a rounded front, and a rear entry door. It features a white stripe and classic urban transit styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded front, two headlights, grille, and upper and lower deck windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two rows of large rectangular windows, the white stripe, and the rear entry door.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single upper window, flat back, and partial view of the entry area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two rows of windows and no visible entry door.
attribute_window_arrangement: Two rows of large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on each side; four on the lower deck and four on the upper deck, separated by vertical pillars.
